response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning closely with the role's stack. His background includes building scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling, with measurable impact in high-throughput environments. His proactive contributions to open-source projects and workshops further highlight his technical depth and leadership.
strengths: Directly relevant full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scalable systems and AI-agent development
Strong open-source contributions and knowledge-sharing initiatives
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though likely transferable from Node.js)
Some roles involved niche languages (DLang) not listed in the job description
German language skills are basic (though not a strict requirement)
